data.content: Implementation review approved. The OpenCode scan now derives option labels from the last non-empty '/'-delimited model-id segment in src/lib/settings-agent-scan.ts, while preserving the original modelId/value. The settings combobox option label no longer uses truncate in src/components/settings-agents-scanned.tsx, so long final tokens remain fully visible. Acceptance criteria verified against the branch diff and tests. Validation run in .knots/_worktree/foolery-5cc7: bun run test src/lib/__tests__/settings-scan.test.ts src/components/__tests__/settings-agents-scanned.test.ts; bunx tsc --noEmit; bun run lint; bun run test; bun run build.
